mapper.select: SELECT * FROM salary_prediction_result ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM salary_prediction_result WHERE DATE(created_at) = #{date} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM salary_prediction_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM salary_prediction_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_prediction_result (user_id, predicted_salary, salary_range_min, salary_range_max, confidence_score, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{predictedSalary}, #{salaryRangeMin}, #{salaryRangeMax}, #{confidenceScore}, NOW())

INSERT INTO salary_prediction_result (user_id, predicted_salary, salary_range_min, salary_range_max, confidence_score, created_at) VALUES
(#{result.userId}, #{result.predictedSalary}, #{result.salaryRangeMin}, #{result.salaryRangeMax}, #{result.confidenceScore}, NOW())
